proof: function[T0: Field](x0: Subfield[T0]) { Subfield.new[T0](x0.contains) = Option.some[Subfield[T0]](x0) }[F](a)
function[T0: Field](x0: Subfield[T0]) { Subfield.new[T0](x0.contains) = Option.some[Subfield[T0]](x0) }[F](b)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { Option.some[T0](x0) != Option.some[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }[Subfield[F]](b, a)
function[T0: Field](x0: Subfield[T0]) { subfield_constraint[T0](x0.contains) }[F](s)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_additive_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_multiplicative_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_additive_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_multiplicative_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)

function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_zero_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_add_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_neg_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_additive_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)

function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_one_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_mul_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_inverse_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_multiplicative_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)

function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_zero_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_add_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_neg_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_additive_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)

function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_zero_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_add_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_neg_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_additive_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)

function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_one_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_mul_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_inverse_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_multiplicative_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)

function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (subfield_one_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_mul_constraint[T0](x0) and subfield_inverse_constraint[T0](x0)) = subfield_multiplicative_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { x0(T0.0) = subfield_zero_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { subfield_one_constraint[T0](x0) = x0(T0.1) }[F](s.contains)

goal: subfield_add_constraint[F](s.contains) = forall(x0: F, x1: F) { s.contains(x0) and s.contains(x1) implies s.contains(x0 + x1) }
proof: function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1) or not x0(x2) or x0(x1 + x2) } = subfield_add_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)
(forall(x0: F, x1: F) { not x0 ∈ s or not x1 ∈ s or x0 + x1 ∈ s } = true)
function(x0: F) { forall(x1: F) { not x0 ∈ s or not x1 ∈ s or x0 + x1 ∈ s } = true }(a)
function(x0: F, x1: F) { not (x0 ∈ s and x1 ∈ s and not x0 + x1 ∈ s) }(a, b)

goal: subfield_neg_constraint[F](s.contains) = forall(x0: F) { s.contains(x0) implies s.contains(-x0) }
proof: function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or x0(-x1) } = subfield_neg_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)
(forall(x0: F) { not x0 ∈ s or -x0 ∈ s } = true)
function(x0: F) { not (x0 ∈ s and not -x0 ∈ s) }(a)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[F](a, b)
function[T0: Field](x0: Subfield[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 ∈ x0 or not x2 ∈ x0 or x1 + x2 ∈ x0 }[F](s, a, -b)
function[T0: Field](x0: Subfield[T0], x1: T0) { not x1 ∈ x0 or -x1 ∈ x0 }[F](s, b)

goal: subfield_mul_constraint[F](s.contains) = forall(x0: F, x1: F) { s.contains(x0) and s.contains(x1) implies s.contains(x0 * x1) }
proof: function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1) or not x0(x2) or x0(x1 * x2) } = subfield_mul_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)
(forall(x0: F, x1: F) { not x0 ∈ s or not x1 ∈ s or x0 * x1 ∈ s } = true)
function(x0: F) { forall(x1: F) { not x0 ∈ s or not x1 ∈ s or x0 * x1 ∈ s } = true }(a)
function(x0: F, x1: F) { not (x0 ∈ s and x1 ∈ s and not x0 * x1 ∈ s) }(a, b)

goal: subfield_inverse_constraint[F](s.contains) = forall(x0: F) { s.contains(x0) and x0 != F.0 implies s.contains(x0.inverse) }
proof: function[T0: Field](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or T0.0 = x1 or x0(x1.inverse) } = subfield_inverse_constraint[T0](x0) }[F](s.contains)
(forall(x0: F) { not x0 ∈ s or F.0 = x0 or x0.inverse ∈ s } = true)
function(x0: F) { not (x0 ∈ s and F.0 != x0 and not x0.inverse ∈ s) }(a)
